module.name: prefer-readonly-parameters
module.description: Prefer readonly typing for object and array-like parameters to prevent accidental mutation of inputs.

scenarios.name: should allow a parameter typed as Readonly<T>
scenarios.given: a function with a parameter typed Readonly<Config>
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the function declaration

scenarios.name: should allow a parameter typed as ReadonlyArray<T>
scenarios.given: a function with a parameter typed ReadonlyArray<string>
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the function declaration

scenarios.name: should allow primitive-typed parameters
scenarios.given: a function with parameters typed string, number, and boolean
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the function declaration

scenarios.name: should allow a constructor parameter property typed as Readonly<T>
scenarios.given: a class constructor parameter property typed Readonly<User>
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the constructor function expression

scenarios.name: should allow callable type references ignored by default
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the parameter type
scenarios.then: no violation is reported because Dispatch is excluded from readonly wrapping

scenarios.name: should allow a configured ignored type-reference name
scenarios.given: a function parameter typed Listener and the rule option ignoredTypeNamePatterns includes ^Listener$
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the parameter type

scenarios.name: should report a type-reference name that does not match configured exclusions
scenarios.given: a function parameter typed User and the configured ignoredTypeNamePatterns do not match User
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the parameter type

scenarios.name: should report an object-typed parameter without readonly
scenarios.given: a function with a parameter typed as a plain object interface without readonly
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the parameter type

scenarios.name: should report an array-typed parameter without readonly
scenarios.given: a function with a parameter typed string[]
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the parameter type

scenarios.name: should autofix a constructor parameter property with a mutable type reference
scenarios.given: a class constructor parameter property typed User
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the parameter type
scenarios.then: a preferReadonlyParameters violation is reported and the autofix rewrites the type to Readonly<User>

scenarios.name: should autofix a constructor parameter property with a mutable array type
scenarios.given: a class constructor parameter property typed string[]
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the parameter type
scenarios.then: a preferReadonlyParameters violation is reported and the autofix rewrites the type to readonly string[]

scenarios.name: should report without autofixing mutable inline type literals
scenarios.given: a function parameter typed as an inline object literal with mutable members
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the parameter type
scenarios.then: a preferReadonlyParameters violation is reported without an autofix because the structural rewrite is not guaranteed to be safe
